Recent News

  • Sep. 2025 Our paper on Training-Free MoA for MDS was submitted to Neural Computing and Applications.
  • Aug. 2025 Started as Research Assistant at Business AI Lab, NEU.
  • Jun. 2024 Our work on BERT-based Vietnamese Bank Document Classification accepted at CITA 2024.
  • Mar. 2024 Published ML-based Intrusion Detection research in Neural Computing and Applications.
